phrases.intent_en: Ask what's on at Place des Arts this weekend
phrases.text_local: Qu'est-ce qui se passe à la Place des Arts cette fin de semaine ?
phrases.pronunciation: kess-KEE suh PASS ah lah plass day ZAHR set fan duh suh-MEN
phrases.cultural_note: 'Fin de semaine' is the Québécois term for weekend (vs. 'week-end' used in France). Place des Arts anchors this cultural district.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for the schedule of the jazz festival
phrases.text_local: La programmation du Festival de jazz, c'est où qu'on la trouve ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah pro-grah-mah-SYON doo fes-tee-VAHL duh JAZZ say OO kon lah TROOV
phrases.cultural_note: The Montréal International Jazz Festival is the world's largest, with over 500 concerts over 11 days each June. Many shows are free outdoors.

responses.english: You can get it at the reception desk or on their website.
responses.phonetic: lah proh-grah-mah-SYOHN dyoo fes-tee-VAHL duh JAHZ, say TOO kawn lah TROOV
responses.french: Vous pouvez la prendre à l'accueil ou sur leur site web.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to sit for free outdoor concerts
phrases.text_local: Y'a des bonnes places pour voir les shows dehors gratuitement ?
phrases.pronunciation: yah day bon PLASS poor VWAHR lay SHOH duh-OR gra-tweet-MAH
phrases.cultural_note: The Esplanade Clark and Place des Festivals host massive free outdoor concerts. Show up early for a spot near the stage.

responses.english: Yes, the bleachers in the center are perfect.
responses.phonetic: YAH day BAWN PLAHS poor VWAHR lay SHOH duh-AWR grah-twee-TMAHN
responses.french: Oui, les gradins au centre sont parfaits.

phrases.text_local: Y'a-tu du stationnement pas trop loin ?
phrases.pronunciation: yah-TOO doo stah-syon-MAH pah troh LWAH
phrases.cultural_note: The metro (Place-des-Arts station) is far easier than driving. If you drive, underground parking is available under Complexe Desjardins nearby.

responses.english: Yes, there is an underground parking lot here.
responses.phonetic: ES suh kee-GREK ah dy stah-syoh-nuh-MAHN pah TROH lwa(n)
responses.french: Oui, il y a un parking souterrain ici.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the luminous PATH installations
phrases.text_local: Les installations lumineuses du quartier, elles sont allumées à quelle heure ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay an-sta-lah-SYON loo-mee-NUZ doo kar-tee-YAY el son ah-loo-MAY ah kel UR
phrases.cultural_note: The Quartier des Spectacles has permanent luminous art installations lit each evening — a beautiful evening stroll year-round.

responses.english: They stay lit all evening in the Quartier des Spectacles, from nightfall onward.
responses.phonetic: bawn-ZHOOR, zhoos-KAH kel UR leh zayn-stah-LAH-syaw(n)z LOO-mee-nuhz dyoo kar-TYAY duh spek-TAH-kl rayst-TELZ ah-loo-MAY
responses.french: Elles restent allumées toute la soirée dans le Quartier des Spectacles, dès la tombée de la nuit.

vocabulary.word_local: le show dehors / le spectacle extérieur
